title: Intermediaries, Hop-by-Hop Fields, Forwarding, and Transformation · Execution Trace: Via Forwarding Evidence
summary: A proxy forwards Connection-nominated fields, copies raw forwarding claims, changes content without metadata repair, and assumes downstream and upstream share one connection and parser. Planned artifact: Add and verify the via forwarding evidence increment in intermediary forwarding and transformation contract. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Construct trusted Via and forwarding evidence at controlled hops without accepting client-supplied identity as authoritative.
Update framing, validators, digests, content codings, warnings, and signatures when an intermediary transforms content.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Predict Via Forwarding Evidence · Theory Via Forwarding Evidence
steps.instruction:
theory case — A theory protocol team handles case 8908 in a municipal gateway receiving one-byte TCP fragments. Build deterministic Go evidence to strip dynamically nominated hop fields and repair metadata after transformations; preserve this operating constraint: one connection has exactly one read owner and one terminal close owner; then change certificate identity while ALPN stays valid and reject the connection. Browser code models bounded byte and state decisions only. Sockets, listeners, live TLS, proxies, packet capture, fuzz campaigns, races, load, HTTP/2, HTTP/3, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Construct trusted Via and forwarding evidence at controlled hops without accepting client-supplied identity as authoritative.

Before reading, predict which action preserves the Via Forwarding Evidence contract for the supplied data.

Evidence target: Predict Via Forwarding Evidence · Theory Via Forwarding Evidence.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for construct trusted via and forwarding evidence at controlled hops without accepting client-supplied identity as authoritative. For Predict Via Forwarding Evidence · Theory Via Forwarding Evidence, keep Via Forwarding Evidence connected to executable Go behavior evidence.
